plugins.name: contextual-design-to-code
plugins.description: Autonomous UI/UX architect — a strict 4-phase design-to-code pipeline (art direction, icon sync, code production, runtime validation) for premium React + Tailwind interfaces.

plugins.name: email-template-from-reference
plugins.description: Generate cross-client HTML email templates from a visual reference (image or Figma) and QA them against the reference with a region-by-region parity loop until they match. Includes a builder skill and a standalone QA skill; email coding rules are built in.
